case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $6,600.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION FOR FORFEITURE IN REM FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $6,600.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100,INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM COURT APPOINTED DIANA LAM AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR LAWRENCE CHIU FILED BY CLAIMANT LAM, DIANA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $6000.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY BRIAN GETZ ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT DIANA LAM INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR LAWRENCE CHIU. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $600.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
FEE FOR APPLICATION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FILED BY CLAIMANT LAM, DIANA
